subject: Durant, a steel-type ant Pokémon with large mandibles, posed in a rocky cave entrance with a coastal view in the background
description: A heavily armored, metallic ant creature crouches inside a rocky cave opening. Its body is grey and segmented with visible markings on the abdomen. Large curved mandibles extend forward prominently. The creature has small red eyes visible near the head area. Behind it, through the cave mouth, a bright coastal scene is visible — deep blue water, rocky sea stacks or small islands, and a pale sky. The contrast between the dark cave interior in the foreground and the bright ocean background creates strong depth. The overall palette is grey, brown-rock tones in the foreground shifting to vivid blue and white in the background.
foreground: Durant in rocky cave, grey armored body, large mandibles extended
background: Cave opening framing a coastal scene with sea stacks and blue water
emotion: aggressive stance, mandibles raised and ready
